creator: schlesinger@netcologne.de
text:
As requested by Garrett, a more detailed description:

1. Exact steps to reproduce this issue:
- use 7.1-PRERELEASE/amd64
- set "MAKE_ARGS=-j 3" in /etc/make.conf
- use an updated ports tree (portsnap fetch && portsnap update)
- cd devel/subversion
- make install clean

2. What occurred between the point of failure and the point where it  
succeeded?
- I've commented out "MAKE_ARGS=-j 3" in /etc/make.conf
- cd devel/subversion
- make install clean

3. When did you last sync your ports tree?
I did sync my ports tree before trying to build devel/subversion, on 
Nov-16-2008.

Thomas
